$description: FIT message schemas found in WELLNESS files. 5-7 files per day, sequential time chunks.

monitoring_mesgs.description: Primary activity monitoring — heart rate, steps, activity type, intensity

timestamp.description: UTC time aligned to logging interval. WARNING: NULL for heart_rate entries (they use timestamp_16 instead)

timestamp_16.description: Compressed 16-bit timestamp offset in seconds. Used by HR entries instead of timestamp. Cannot be trivially converted to absolute time without base timestamp from monitoring_info_mesgs.

heart_rate.description: Heart rate in beats per minute

steps.description: Step count (sub_field of cycles, depends on activity_type)

distance.description: Distance in meters (raw value divided by 100)

ascent.description: Elevation gain (raw value divided by 1000). NOT present in all files — only during elevation-tracking activities.

descent.description: Elevation loss (raw value divided by 1000). NOT present in all files — only during elevation-tracking activities.

cycles.description: Raw cycle count (steps are a sub_field of this). SDK auto-scales.

active_time.description: Active time in seconds for the monitoring interval

current_activity_type_intensity.description: Packed field combining activity type and intensity. Present on most records.

duration_min.description: Duration in minutes. Rare — appears on summary-type records.

gotchas: Heart rate uses timestamp_16, NOT timestamp. msg.get('timestamp') returns None for HR entries.
Group HR data by file parent directory date, not by timestamp.
Multiple WELLNESS files per day — always iterate ALL files for a given day.

stress_level_time.description: Measurement time. NOTE: uses stress_level_time, NOT the standard timestamp field

3.name: body_battery
3.description: Body Battery level. Higher = more energy. Charges during sleep/rest, drains during activity/stress.

2.name: body_battery_charge_rate
2.description: Charge/drain rate. Positive = charging, negative = draining. 102 when stress_level_value is -2.

gotchas: Negative values are invalid markers, not actual stress levels.

respiration_rate.description: Breaths per minute. SDK auto-scales (raw / 100). Normal range: 12-20 br/min at rest.
respiration_rate.filter: > 0 (negative values are invalid: -300 invalid, -200 large motion, -100 off wrist)

gotchas: Negative values encode specific error states, not actual readings.

reading_spo2.description: Blood oxygen saturation percentage. Normal: 95-100%. Below 90% concerning.

monitoring_info_mesgs.description: File metadata — timestamp base for compressed timestamps. Not currently parsed.

ohr_settings_mesgs.description: Optical heart rate sensor settings. Not currently parsed.

unknown_233.description: Unknown message type 233. Possibly raw sensor data. Not parsed.

unknown_355.description: Unknown message type 355. Metadata or training-related. Not parsed.
